entry.title: Re: Table for Due packages in maintenance plan
entry.content: Thanks for this solution, this was very useful for me!

entry.title: Customer Return stock R8 with Vendor Return
entry.content:
Hi Everybody,

we would like to post a customer return with 651 to a blocked unvaluated stock. In EWM I get stock type R8. But when I create a return PO for the vendor (mvtp 161) I have no chance to refer to the customer return stock in order to get the stock type R8 in my vendor return outbound delivery. Do you know, how I can refer in ERP and finally in ERP to my customer return stock in order to pick the vendor return outbound delivery?

 

Thanks. 

Regards

Daniel

entry.title: Re: Manual Reconciliation help for multiple BP
entry.content:
Hi Holly,

I see your payments are posted as a Journal Entry. Is there a reason behind it? Usually, payments are posted by using Banking > Incoming Payments (AR), Outgoing Payments (AP) or even the Payment Wizard (bulk payment run) where the payment is tied up with the Invoice. When this happens, SAP reconciles the Invoice and Payment automatically so you don't need to worry about doing it manually. See SAP Documentation by clicking on the below:

Incoming Payments | SAP Help Portal

I hope it helps you.

Felipe

entry.title: Re: TEXTs are NOT copied - when copying a material master from another material master
entry.content: Hello ! Did you get any solution ? I am facing the similiar problem.

entry.title: Re: Now available: ABAP Platform Trial
entry.content:
Why the sapstartsrv shows yellow on HANA Studio? 
I already checked everything related to this. Also, the SAP note 1639568. 

I already exposed the ports 50213 and 50214.

Everything else is working as expected...

Or this is a normal behavior @ralf_henning ?

 

All these ports are exposed outside docker and OS

entry.title: MMPV_DATE_CHECK: Error occurred (Note 1082841).
entry.content:
Dear Expert ,

How to Solve this error i am unable to post my GRPO Document due to 

MMPV_DATE_CHECK: Error occurred (Note 1082841).*

*Transaction MMPV (period closing program) cannot be executed. For more information, see Note 1082841*

entry.title: Re: How to Remove On-Order stock In MMBE
entry.content: Since, you have already delete the PO. The on order stock should also gone from MMBE. Please check in MD04 transaction if there is any Open PO?

entry.title: Re: Error when closing production order due to inspection...
entry.content: Hello @janbuchmann, this seemed to work with the FM STATUS_CHANGE_INTERN_VB, don't know the difference from the one you mentioned, but great point anyways. Thank you very much for your help. Appreciate it. Just to mention, we are applying the UD w/o goods movements, so cancelling won't be the way to go in our case.

entry.title: Re: How I can merge member cell sap sac ?
entry.content:
@nasser_itani 

Be default No.

1 project 3 deliverable will make combination of 1X3. 

you need to somehow create a link between deliverable and project either by attributes or dummy facts posting and use booked option to show the right project and deliverable pair combination.

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: EWM 1909 identification type for business partners
entry.content: Sorry, I have one question. As part of ZEWMDEBMAS, if we need to send identification type details which is not part of reduced message, how it can be done.

entry.title: Re: How to encrypt and decrypt files using GPG - SAP Commissions
entry.content: Can You please share installation process of GPG on windows?

entry.title: Re: Pick datetime Bugs
entry.content: Hi, put a small Delay in between the selections and the time picker should pop up.

entry.title: Is it safe to use ENQUEUE_ESINDX in S/4HANA?
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are migrating to S/4HANA and our ATC lists all usage of ENQUEUE_ESINDX (Used to make sure sure program/table is only used by one person at a time) as priority 1 "error". In the attached SAP Note there's no mention of this FM specifically, it's a general note for SAP S/4HANA custom code adaption - removal of orphaned objects. 

I've tested the programs and this functionality specifically and it's still working just fine. Should I be worried this would be suddenly removed in a minor update in the future?

If I need to address this, what should I use instead of ENQUEUE_ESINDX and DEQUEUE_ESINDX?

Thanks,
Birgir Snorrason

entry.title: SAP Build Apps - IOS SDK version warning
entry.content:
Dear SAP Build Apps Team,

A few of our latest iOS builds returned a warning from Apple mentioning that from April 29, 2024, all iOS apps shall be built with iOS 17SDK or later. While the current SDK in use is iOS 16.2 SDK. 

This post here is just a request and a notification to raise awareness of this issue. 

Best regards.

PS. We just want to avoid last year's case where iOS builds were not accepted by Apple for a few weeks until the issue has been resolved. So we'd be glad if this issue got priority and matched the deadlines set out by Apple.

entry.title: DMO with System Move - Instance Profile Migration for PAS?
entry.content:
Hello, 

I want migrate my System from AnyDB to SAP HANA DB using SUM DMO with System Move. Will the Instance Profile of my old PAS also be migrated, or do I have to migrate the DB-independent Parameters afterwards manually?

Thank you and Kind regards!

entry.title: Re: 🇮🇳 SAP CodeJam ABAP: SAP BTP, ABAP Environment & RAP
entry.content: Other than ADT , will there be any pre requisite needed for all attendee?

entry.title: Re: What's up with OpenSAP (Downtime?)
entry.content:
Hi Sebastian,

Same for me. I have tried multiple times today without success. I believe it is unplanned.

UPDATE:

  • using private/internal network (corporate) https://open.sap.com/ is unavailable
  • the site https://open.sap.com/ is available from public network

Regards,
Laszlo

entry.title: How to give interface to external customer to our SAP environment?
entry.content:
We require our External customer to send some information through some web portal to our SAP environment in real time basis. Is there any standard SAP solution available for this so that we can provide login access to vendors through web portal to make some transactions and send data to SAP.

 

Please suggest. Thanks in advance.

thank you for the great blog. In step 9 you mentioned that you have attached an example ? Where can I find this example?

Best Regards

Youssef

entry.title: Re: SAP Stammtisch Wien 07.03.2024
entry.content:
topic für heute Abend: 
anybody mit Erfahrung in SAP HANA NSE Native Storage Extension?
SAP HANA Native Storage Extension | SAP Help Portal

oder Data Aging?

entry.title: Special stock partner assignment at Ship to party level (Customer Consignments)
entry.content: There's a requirement to assign the special stock partner (SB) at the ship to party level when doing customer consignments. The client requires to see customer consignment stock at the outlets for their chain customers. In the standard partner determination setup, special stock partner function is only allowed at the CUST account type, but not for SHPT (ship to accounts). Is there any way we can get the special stock partner assignment at the ship to level.

entry.title: A day in the life of Sarah, a Production Supervisor using SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
Meet Sarah, a Production Supervisor at a high-volume high tech manufacturing plant in US using SAP Digital Manufacturing.

Her day begins with a quick check-in at her desk, a steaming cup of coffee in hand, and a glance at her computer screen.

First stop: Resource Orchestration (aka REO), a cloud-based solution that empowers her to perform last mile scheduling in the shop floor, for the next couple of shifts, taking constraints like equipment, worker, and tools availability into account.

Learn more: 

  • Resource Orchestration within SAP Digital Manufacturing (Incl. Shift Planning and Tools)
  • SAP Digital Manufacturing - Resource Orchestration

Here, Sarah gets a bird's-eye view of the orders lined up for the next shifts. With a few clicks, she schedules operations, adjust workers schedule based on their skills and reserves the tools needed, and releases production orders to the shop floor, so the manufacturing process can start.

Learn more: 

  • Tool Management within SAP Digital Manufacturing
  • SAP Digital Manufacturing Tool Management, Scheduling and Usage Tracking
  • SAP Digital Manufacturing: A Deep Dive into Tool Management Capabilities

As the day progresses, Sarah keeps a close eye on Line Monitor POD. This handy tool gives her real-time updates on Overall Equipment Effectiveness (OEE) KPIs and live monitoring of the shop floor. It's like having a window into the heart of the operation, allowing her to spot any issues and make adjustments on the fly.

Today, however, Sarah notices a blip on the radar – the quality KPI is lower than usual.

Learn more: 

  • SAP Digital Manufacturing for Insights
  • SAP Digital Manufacturing for Insights Overview

Concerned, she investigates the problem deeper, pulling up existing standard reports for order progress and traceability information.

Learn more: 

  • SAP Digital Manufacturing for Insights
  • SAP Digital Manufacturing for Insights Overview

She then turns to SAP Digital Manufacturing for Insights, leveraging embedded SAC (SAP Analytics Cloud) dashboards, where she can use drill-down capabilities to find comprehensive information on component consumption, defects, nonconformances, rework, traceability and visual inspection results.

Learn more: 

  • SAP Digital Manufacturing for Insights
  • SAP Digital Manufacturing for Insights Overview

With this information on hands, Sarah works together with her team of data scientists to analise the root cause of the issue by leveraging the latest visual inspection results, powered by AI. They find out that a new type of defect is happening in the shop floor, which has been going on without being noticed by workers.

Together, they get to the bottom of the problem and take immediate actions to address it by training an improved AI/ML model and deploying it to the shop floor, so this new type of defect can be identified earlier.

Learn more: AI-driven Visual Inspection (BETA) powered by SAP

As the day goes by, her efforts pay off – the quality KPI starts to climb again, getting back closer to where it needs to be.

With a sense of accomplishment, Sarah closes out the day knowing that she's not only met but exceeded all production and KPI targets.

In a world where every minute counts and every decision matters, Sarah is the hero, using the power of SAP Digital Manufacturing to keep operations running smoothly and efficiently.

As she shuts down her computer and heads home, she can't help but feel a sense of pride in a job well done.

Experiencing SAP Digital Manufacturing

You can have a glimpse and experience several aspects of SAP Digital Manufacturing via the Interactive Value Journeys below:

Discrete within SAP Digital Manufacturing and S/4HANA Cloud
Process Industry within SAP Digital Manufacturing and S/4HANA Cloud
Tool Management within SAP Digital Manufacturing
Resource Orchestration within SAP Digital Manufacturing
Production Process Design within SAP Digital Manufacturing
Shop Floor Orchestration with SAP Digital Manufacturing
Time Tracking within SAP Digital Manufacturing
SAP Digital Manufacturing for Insights
Nonconformances Processes within SAP Digital Manufacturing


Do you like this post? Please let me know in the comments section what you think. Any feedback is highly appreciated.

Or, if you have any questions, please check SAP Community Q&A Area, or comment down below.

Thanks,
Manoel Costa

entry.title: Re: What's up with OpenSAP (Downtime?)
entry.content:
same for me -  seems to be unavailable for several days  https://www.saashub.com/opensap-status
any expectation @Laszlo_Thoma    when this will be resolved ?

entry.title: EMIGALL: Property Start Date is coming as System Date
entry.content:
When the properties are getting created in SAP from Conversion using EMIGALL object - PROPERTY, the start date of property is coming as System Date instead of the actual start date which is available in Legacy.
How can the property start date set as actual date instead of the system date?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: EMIGALL: Property Start Date is coming as System Date
entry.content:
By default, this field is set to the system date, but it can be customized as per your requirements.
To change the date, please follow these steps:

1. Open the service function module interface (EMIGALL -> Migration Object -> Change -> Interface button).
2. Locate the parameter X_KEYDATE and update it from SY-DATUM to AUTO-EPROPD-KEYDATE.
3. If necessary, make changes to the KEYDATE field in the EPROD automation data structure.

entry.title: Re: WebGUI: 503 Service Not Available / Tenant runlevel s...
entry.content:
I#ll went through different manuals and checked everything double times.

It had used a port that was probably already used. Now i changed to another port and now the icf service entries show as activated i can now acess via webbrowser, resulting after some minutes in a another error.

500 Connection timed out

entry.title: Re: Move one subaccount from one global account to anothe...
entry.content:
Hello @ohisler 

SAP Note 3041304 also complements Note shared by Marty although with a different request, shares the manual activities that need to be performed to migrate services from one subaccount to another, after the Replacement Order for the new GLobal Account. 

There are services that allow simple download/export to then be imported easily into the new subaccount but the majority requires manual setup of respective services, instances, token setup, etc. 

Thank you

Tiago Ribeiro

entry.title: Re: ZOOM VLS integration with SuccessFactors Learning
entry.content:
I receive th efollowing error: 


Validation Error
Please correct the following errors before proceeding:

The user account could not be created on ZOOM VLS VLS Server. Please try again later or note the error and contact your VLS administrator.
VLS Error: Bad Request Invalid access token, does not contain scopes:[user:write:admin, user_info:read, user:read:admin, user_profile, user:read, user:write].

entry.title: Re: Staging bay not assigned to ODO or WT when door assig...
entry.content: /scwm/stadet_ass is missing an entry. You should have warehouse process type and door detr group as well.

entry.title: 1H 2024 Product Release upgrades already in Production
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

Have any of you experienced that upgrades from 1H 2024 Product Release are already in Production instance? We are more than 2 months before Production release, but some of them are live.

  • Development Goals subsection and block visible in People Profile. That was not the case previously. I have full admin permissions, but once this block appeared it says: "You don’t have the necessary permission. Please contact your administrator for help." This is totally new thing in people profile and that's why admin permissions were not configured yet.
  • MDF Permissions column in Role Based Permission: Permission to User domain in Report Center. It was presented in SAP SuccessFactors 1H 2024 Release Preview Webinar as new feature of 1H 2024 Release, but it is already available on Production.
  • We disabled Latest Applicant Workbench just after 2H 2023 Release, but couple days ago it was automatically enabled again.

We already reported that to our Customer Success Manager, but no replay yet. Please let me know if you experienced similar strange changes in your Production instances.

Thank you,

Damian

entry.title: Re: WebGUI: 503 Service Not Available / Tenant runlevel s...
entry.content:
On the search for the timeout problem i cleared the >ICM Trace-File, restarted the ICM and checked the Trace File.

There are peer SSL-Errors listed, even i had not tried to connect via Browser after the restart, so i gues that could be a problem of a internal communication?

Can someone explain me where that SSL-error is coming from?

entry.title: Powersheel Script - Set a checkbox as true
entry.content:
Hi,

I am working on a project to automate work order creation in PM. I try to use Powershell with SAP Script.

I have an issue with a checkbox (VIQMEL/MSAUS). I would like to check it but I cannot find the way.

This is the code I tried :

$ID = Invoke-Method -object $session -methodName "findById" -methodParameter @("wnd[0]/usr/subSUB_ALL:SAPLCOIH:3001/ssubSUB_LEVEL:SAPLCOIH:1100/tabsTS_1100/tabpIHKZ/ssubSUB_AUFTRAG:SAPLCOIH:1120/subNOTIFICATION_DATA:SAPLIQS0:7010/tabsTSTRIP_7010/tabp$TS01/ssubTSTRIP_SCREEN:SAPLIQS0:7020/chkVIQMEL-MSAUS");
Set-Property -object $ID -propertyName "selected" -propertyValue @($true); 

See the Script code (which works) : Session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/subSUB_ALL:SAPLCOIH:3001/ssubSUB_LEVEL:SAPLCOIH:1100/tabsTS_1100/tabpIHKZ/ssubSUB_AUFTRAG:SAPLCOIH:1120/subNOTIFICATION_DATA:SAPLIQS0:7010/tabsTSTRIP_7010/tabp$TS01/ssubTSTRIP_SCREEN:SAPLIQS0:7020/chkVIQMEL-MSAUS").Selected = True

Do you have a idea how I could manage that?

Thanks a lot for you help

entry.title: Re: How can we get details like Created By and Created On...
entry.content: Please provide the link to your other question - have you tried the $metadata tag like "and.com/sap/opu/odata/sap/YY1_SALES_REVENUE_CDS/$metadata" this will at least give the field types (string, etc)

entry.title: Re: How can we get details like Created By and Created On...
entry.content: In public cloud we don't provide direct access to tables - but you can also check the view browser and it will show some table field names (this would not be programmatic)... should work even for custom cds views i believe

entry.title: Re: Capacity Leveling with Tabular capacity planning table
entry.content: When would then the tabular table be more beneficial Caetano??

entry.title: V.23 report displays rejected sales documents with billing block
entry.content:
A sales order with billing block is fully rejected, but V.23 does still list it.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: V.23 report displays rejected sales documents with bi...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

the reported behavior corresponds with the standard design of V.23 report. The check for the rejection was removed to avoid performance related issues during executing the report. You may find further information in the following SAP note: 768619 - Performance problems in Transaction V23

Best regards,

Peter

SAP Product Support

entry.title: Re: Security's role within the new Cloud
entry.content:
Let me state that nothing in SAP calls for a radical change, also not a shift in the technology stack.  Remember when SAP Fiori was first introduced?  Yes, 2013.  11 years later we still see a mass use of the SAP GUI.  Adoption of new technologies may go faster nowadays, a full transition may very well take another 10 years.

Security experts must extend their knowledge to hybrid and cloud-native skills to secure the SAP technology and application stack.

entry.title: RAP: Error message in the definition method
entry.content:
Hello experts,

Does anybody know if it is possible to stop behavior execution and return the error back to API caller from the FOR DETERMINE method? I am using this method to call a BAPI and change my currently processed entity with a transaction ID returned from the BAPI. However, if the BAPI fails for any reason - I would like to return the error message back to API caller. I have tried populating REPORTED itab, but that doesn't stop the execution and save is eventually executed.

I know that this is possible via FOR VALIDATE methods and with FAILED itab, however I need to use the MODIFY ENTITIES statement (to update currently processed entity) which I cannot use in FOR VALIDATE method (hard error).

Any suggestions

entry.title: How to convert warning message MM072 into error message
entry.content:
Hi,

How to convert warning message MM072 or MM071 into error message?

entry.title: Re: Generate PFX file to connect SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, cloud edition to SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi @dhruvpshah 

Thanks for your comment. To address the SSL handshake error, please create an incident with SAP support to further analyze the root cause.

Best Regards

Mahesh Varma

entry.title: Re: Generate PFX file to connect SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, cloud edition to SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello Mahesh,

Thank you for responding. I have already created Case: 255879/2024 Case Management Dashboard - SAP for Me

Regards,

Dhruv

entry.title: Re: Error: To create a mapping, use the development syste...
entry.content:
Hello Helen,

both the note and the system error message that you receive point out that you can execute the renumbering app only in a development system (in case your S/4 landscape is a 3 system landscape) or in the Q system (in case you are working in a 2 system landscape). I am assuming that you are trying to use the app in a system that does not fulfill this requirement.

So, my advice would be to switch to a system with the required precondition.

Best regards, Holger Gebert

entry.title: Re: Corporate applicants to the digital skills initiative: Tell us your story!
entry.content:
Hello 

I have completed my BCA ,MCA and found a SAP internship program in India where as i picked to be as full time employee but now it is a career break of almost 6 year (marriage, pregnancy ) wanted to start my career as SAP consultant , this certification will help me get more opportunities in the coming future.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: IM Module :: IO Budget Supplement Error
entry.content: how you have solved internally pls tell me i am facing same error

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) - empty rows in Table appear for no reason
entry.content:
Hey all,

i copied a story Table to keep some of the formatting and my styles within the designer panel. All of a sudden i realized (i think after transporting between tenants) that there is empty rows below my table entries. When i enable the pagination feature on the table it gives me 5 pages, whereas the first page is the casual table and the last 4 pages are just the header & empty rows. If i disable the pagination, there will just appear a scrollable table, which is unreasonably long & scrollable. Obviously i could just redo my table but i wanted to post this here to save me some work of remodeling a lot of stories, since this is happening to a lot of my tables. 

fyi: I am using a BW live model within unified Stories, no coding.

To summarize : My tables looks totally fine, but underneeth i have these empty rows which are not supressable through common available options within SAC - i think its a bug but im happy to find a solution.

 

or not paginated :

Thanks for taking the time,

Mirko

 

SAP Analytics Cloud #SAC

entry.title: API to connect data from HANA to APPIAN
entry.content:
We want to connect HANA database from APPIAN application. Is there any direct way to do that like JDBC/ODBC connection? If not, what's the best way to do the same? Is there any API which can be used?

SAP HANA streaming analytics BW SAP HANA Modeling Tools (Eclipse)

entry.title: Re: Exposing an oData Service from SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition to the SAP BTP

I'm Vitali. I've been developing for SAP for couples of years. My current scope of interests is S4HANA Public Cloud and everything that is related to Steampunk, Key User/Developer Extensibility, BTP, RAP. 

Hope to explore community and find some stuff that inspire me on new development.

BR Janine

entry.title: Supply Chain
entry.content:
Hello, everyone, I am new to this platform and pleased to be here, I`m looking for some clarity!

I have started the learning journey to becoming a specialist in the supply chain, at the moment I have completed a few courses which lead to a record of achievement, which is good yet I am unsure of whether this is the right thing, 

Can anyone help me in this regard, please?

Thank you for your time and consideration 

 

Best regards 

 

Brian

entry.title: Re: WebGUI: 503 Service Not Available / Tenant runlevel s...
entry.content: You are using a self signed certificate. You need to import it on STRUST to the system be able to recognize it.

entry.title: Re: JP5 Data export of large data
entry.content: You posted in the Welcome Corner rather than a product-specific question/answer space. Which SAP software are you running? "JP5" is unfamiliar; is that a transaction code?

entry.title: Re: WebGUI: 503 Service Not Available / Tenant runlevel s...
entry.content: Es ist ein Kernel 754 Patchlevel 200 installiert auf Linux RHEL 8.9.

entry.title: SAP Cloud Acceleration: Ihr Personal Training für die Cloud
entry.content:
Wie schaffen es Organisationen das Maximale aus ihrem Cloud Investment zu ziehen und welche Unterstützung wünschen sie sich?

Um dies beantworten zu können ist es wichtig, die Kundenanforderung in der Cloud genau zu kennen. Wie? Natürlich indem man die Kunden direkt befragt.

Deshalb haben wir uns gemeinsam mit dem IT Onlinemagazin entschieden, eine Umfrage zu starten, um diese Bedarfe zu erfragen.

Zentrale Wünsche unserer Kunden:

Persönlicher Ansprechpartner

Der zentrale Wunsch ist ein persönlichen Ansprechpartner. Dieser ist sowohl mit der individuellen Kundensituation vertraut und kann mit seiner Expertise rund um die Cloud-Lösungen die Anforderungen des Kunden und die Potentiale der Cloud Lösung optimal zusammenführen.

Hilfestellung bei Release Updates

Kunden wünschen sich Hilfe bei der Beantwortung der Frage, welche neuen Funktionalitäten es im Rahmen der Release Updates gibt und wie diese zeitnah und wertsteigernd für das Unternehmen eingesetzt werden können.

Maßgeschneiderte Lernangebote für die Mitarbeitenden

Die Mitarbeitenden (Projektteams und Enduser) sind der zentrale Erfolgsfaktor einer Transformation. Sie müssen die neuen Prozesse verstehen und die entsprechende Software bedienen können.

Kurze Antwortzeiten im Bedarfsfall

Herausforderungen und Probleme bedürfen zeitnaher Lösungen. Kurze Antwortzeiten im Bedarfsfall sind ein weiterer Wunsch unserer Kunden.

Optimierung des Anwendungsbetriebs

Mitarbeitende in wertsteigernden Tätigkeiten (z.B. Optimierung der Geschäftsprozesse) einzusetzen, hat für die Unternehmen Priorität. Im Rahmen des Fachkräftemangels ist es der Wunsch, die Mitarbeitenden im Bereich des Anwendungsbetriebs zu entlasten, um  Kapazitäten für die Einführung von Innovationen frei zu machen.

Wie können diese Kundenwünsche für Erfolg in der Cloud nun am besten umgesetzt werden?

Ähnlich wie im Sport bedarf es für den maximalen Erfolg einen auf sie zugeschnittenen Plan, sowie Unterstützung durch Experten, die Sie auf dem Weg zum Erfolg begleiten.

Dadurch wird sichergestellt, dass ihre individuellen Ziele erreicht, sowie alle notwendigen Maßnahmen auf dem Weg dorthin beschrieben sind. Dies garantiert maximalen Erfolg in kürzester Zeit.

Was ist SAP Cloud Acceleration?

Vereinfacht ausgedrückt ist SAP Cloud Acceleration Ihr Personal Training für die Cloud.

Ob gemeinsame Analyse der Ausgangslage, Entwicklung Ihres individuellen Erfolgsplans unter Berücksichtigung Ihrer individuellen Ziele, Einführung neuer Funktionalitäten oder Erstellung passender Trainingspläne für Ihre Experten und Endanwender bis hin zur Optimierung Ihres Anwendungsbetriebs – wir unterstützen Sie in allen Phasen und verhindern so falsche Weichenstellungen. Somit arbeiten wir mit Ihnen gemeinsam daran, das volle Potential Ihres Cloud Investments optimal und somit schneller und besser zu entfalten.

Was sind die Erfolgsfaktoren von SAP Cloud Acceleration ?

  • Lassen Sie uns bei der Sportanalogie bleiben und versuchen, diese Frage durch den Vergleich mit einem Personal Trainer im Fitnessstudio zu beantworten. Der Personal Trainer im Sport ist bei SAP Cloud Acceleration der Customer Success Partner (CSP). Er ist ihr zentraler Ansprechpartner rund um Ihre Cloud Lösung.
  • Der Trainingsplan im Sport heißt bei SAP Cloud Acceleration Success Plan. In diesem werden die relevanten Maßnahmen zur Erreichung Ihrer Geschäftsziele definiert.
  • Für körperliche Fitness und ein ganzheitliches Wohlbefinden benötigt man unterschiedliche Experten. Dies kann der Physiotherapeut oder der Ernährungsberater im Sport sein. Im Rahmen der Nutzung Ihrer Cloudlösung sind dies weitere Technik- oder Produktexperten. Dieses Netzwerk an Experten koordiniert der Customer Success Partner für Sie. Somit profitieren Sie von Expertenwissen, wann immer sie es brauchen.
  • Neue Erkenntnisse im Sport führen zu einer Optimierung der Trainingsmethoden. Dies gilt auch für Cloudlösungen. Diese unterliegen ebenfalls einer ständigen Optimierung, welche mit Hilfe von Release-updates unseren Kunden zur Verfügung gestellt werden. Welche neuen Funktionalitäten hieraus wertsteigernd für Ihre Ziele eingesetzt werden können, bespricht ihr Customer Success Partner mit Ihnen.
  • Bei Herausforderungen, welche zeitnah einer Lösung bedürfen, können Sie sich auf eine schnelle Reaktion und Hilfe anhand optimierter Service Level Agreements verlassen.
  • Um Ihre Ziele zu erreichen, benötigen sie ein fittes bzw. gut ausgebildetes Team. Wir stellen Ihnen mit dem SAP Learning Hub eine Lernplattform zur Verfügung, die Ihr Projektteam mit einer maßgeschneiderten Ausbildung zu allen relevanten Themen versorgt, um dies zu erreichen. Mit SAP Enable Now können Sie zudem Dokumentation und Training für Enduser erstellen und anpassen.  SAP Enable Now sind unterstützende Inhalte, die in die Anwendung integriert sind und den Benutzern überall und jederzeit zur Verfügung stehen, um die Benutzerakzeptanz und Produktivität zu steigern.
  • Lassen Sie Ihre Mitarbeiter das tun, was Sie am besten können – die Arbeit mit dem Kunden. Wir kümmern uns darum, dass ihr Anwendungsbetrieb optimal funktioniert. Durch die Unterstützung des Anwendungsbetriebs und der Einführung von Innovationen hilft Ihnen SAP Cloud Application Services dabei, Ihre Mitarbeiter zu entlasten und sich auf die wertsteigenden Tätigkeiten (z.B. Optimierung Ihrer Geschäftsprozesse) zu konzentrieren.

 

Abbildung: Überblick Erfolgskomponenten SAP Cloud Acceleration und SAP Portfolio

Welche quantifizierbaren Mehrwerte liefert SAP Cloud Acceleration?

Eine speziell für diesen Fall in Auftrag gegebene Forrester Studie zeigt, dass SAP Cloud Acceleration die Implementierung um 10% beschleunigt.

Weitere Vorteile sind:

  • Eine um 10% schnellere Wertschöpfung
  • Eine um 24% gesteigerte Produktivität
  • Das Release-Management wird 25% schneller
  • Die Geschäftsprozess-Effizienz wird um 30% verbessert

Was sagen unsere Kunden?

„Durch den SAP Preferred Success Service ist unsere Implementierung innerhalb von 6 Monaten möglich geworden. Die Effizienzsteigerung ist enorm.“

Alexander Nieswandt
Gründer und Geschäftsführer,
WhiteWall Media GmbH

„Die Entscheidung unseres CFO für SAP Preferred Success war sehr gut und wichtig, da wir das Projekt nur mit unseren eigenen Kapazitäten vermutlich nicht geschafft hätten.“ Video

Jochen Trefzger
Senior Consultant,
Detecon International GmbH

Lassen Sie uns gemeinsam das volle Potential Ihres Cloud Investments optimieren. Kommen Sie gerne auf uns zu bei Fragen oder falls Sie weitere Information möchten.

e-Mail

SAP Cloud Acceleration Webcast Serie

SAP Cloud Acceleration on sap.com

entry.title: Re: package/fuction pkg_student.Get_delm_stud_qual_stat_r...
entry.content: Hi, I have the same interessts like Jeanette.

entry.title: Re: RAP: Error message in the definition method
entry.content:
I think I somewhat figured it out.

First, in FOR DETERMINE method I store the message in %msg object of the reported structure, like so:

INSERT VALUE #( orderuuid   = <fs_repair_order>-orderuuid
                %create     = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
                %state_area = 'XYZ'
                %msg        = me->new_message_with_text( severity = CONV #( <fs_response>-type )
                                                         text     = <fs_response>-message ) ) INTO TABLE reported-repairorder.

Then in FOR VALIDATE ON SAVE, I read the entity in question like so:

READ ENTITIES OF zoem_i_repairorder IN LOCAL MODE
    ENTITY repairorder
    ALL FIELDS WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
    RESULT DATA(lt_data)
    REPORTED DATA(lt_reported_data).

In this case, lt_reported_data will contain the entity with %msg content that I can analyze and, if any errors are present, populate the "failed" structure.

If anyone knows different (more correct way) of doing it - please let me know.

entry.title: Re: WebGUI: 503 Service Not Available / Tenant runlevel s...
entry.content: Nope, thast was my browser, After clearing the log and restarting the ICM AFTER i closed all browser trabs, that ssl errors are gone.

entry.title: Re: Consumption for Component from DM not executed in S/4...
entry.content:
Hi Rahul,

for now this should be sufficient as an solution. We checked all points that you mentioned here, everything is working fine. The missing step is still the way how the consumption can be processed automatically in S/4 Backend. When using the report CORUPROC the consumption is finally processed as expected and material document gets created. So yes, it's a solution. The reason why it is not working without report is still open...

 

Thanks a lot!

BR,

Christoph

entry.title: Re: WebGUI: 503 Service Not Available / Tenant runlevel s...
entry.content:
Beside the ssl error, which would probably not prevent me from accessing WebGUI via http, i found one problem that raises questions about another wrtongly configured port maybe?

hr 139706979148672] MtxInit: ICM 0 2
hr 139706979148672] ***LOG IM1=> IcmInit, Startup (ICM&IteaSAP26.iteanova.local&3637303&) [icxxman.c 2284]
hr 139706979148672] ***LOG Q0I=> NiIBindSocket: could not delete file '/tmp/.sapstream65000' for hdl 1: unlink (1: Operation not permitted) [/bas/754_REL/s
hr 139706979148672] *** ERROR => NiIBindSocket: could not delete file '/tmp/.sapstream65000' (hdl 1; errno=0) [nixxi.cpp 3893]

entry.title: Movement 101 does not have IBD number.
entry.content:
I download GR report in tcode MB51 with mvt 101, however there is only PO number and no IBD number included. I may need GR report with IBD number as our 3PL GR using IBD number.
This is due, 1 PO may have multiple IBD number, and 1 IBD number also may have multiple PO.

FYI, we are using SAP Sunrise

entry.title: Re: SAC Live and Import Connection Overview

entry.title: How to Delete Cloud Subaccount
entry.content:
How to Delete Cloud Subaccount


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to Delete Cloud Subaccount
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

After having unsubscribed from SAP Cloud ALM, and after having deleted the Cloud ALM subaccount, you can consider the SAP Cloud ALM application to be completely removed. 

To delete your SAP Cloud ALM subscription in your Subaccount, refer to the KBA 3247776 - How to Unsubscribe the Subscription for SAP Cloud ALM in the SAP Cloud ALM Subaccount

Note : Once SAP Cloud ALM is provisioned, we do not recommended deleting it. Once you delete, if you want to provision Cloud ALM, you will need to do it manually. You could temporarily stop access by removing the trust relationship to the Custom IAS. This way there would be no way to authenticate users when they tried to logon. When they are ready to use it again they could re-establish the trust relationship to the Custom IAS

Best Regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: How to run IBP realignment between currencies
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

The SAP recommendation is to have a single currency planning object at a base planning level.  When we set up our initial model we were not aware of this recommendation and as a result we have hit a couple of issues with how our data aggregates to higher levels. 

I am now trying to correct this using the realignment process to merge currency records, however when realigning values no currency conversion takes place so I move 100 USD to CNY and I get 100 CNY.  

Some of the key figures I wished to realign are not marked as editable which I believe limits my ability to use CIDS or Copy Operators as alternate methods.

Is there a way to have the currency conversion applied during a realignment or are there other options available to me?

Thanks.

Jez

entry.title: Re: the create function does not working by using (business API) in RAP application
entry.content: You forgot to pass some mandatory field values (here notification type)

entry.title: Re: JP5 Data export of large data

entry.title: S_E38_98000088 (reporting)
entry.content: When using the transaction S_E38_98000088 (reporting) in S/4Hana to evaluate the data of a certain profit center, an error occurs when selecting a local ledger. The error code is KY041: You made an entry for a characteristic which is compounded with another. This means that this characteristic is always interpreted in connection with the value of one or more other characteristics. This is visible in the list of possible entries under F4 where several columns of characteristics are displayed. The characteristic value you entered may not be displayed as you entered it, but in combination with the characteristic values which you chose for other characteristics. This error doesnt occur when selecting the main ledger 0L.

entry.title: Re: WebGUI: 503 Service Not Available / Tenant runlevel s...
entry.content: I#ll check that ssl error at other servers with wworking WebGUI. That errors show up there as well and did not limit the function of the WebGUI.

entry.title: Re: SAP RAP behavior definition error with Lock master
entry.content: I have the same issue.

entry.title: Rehire a employee who is on Global Assignment in the host country
entry.content:
Dear experts,

We have a scenario in our company where we are localizing an employee who is on global assignment. We are using SF as source and data is replicated back to SAP HCM system where we have Payroll .  We have a requirement that we want localized SAP ID ( PERNR) to be same as SAP Global Assignment ID in other words Employment id in Host Country ( PERNR) . Example below: 

 

Friedrich Felix is a German employee who was working from 2023-01-01 till 2023-07-31 in German company A with SAP PERNR as "100". . From 2023-08-01 he came to work in USA in a global assignment for 2 months i.e. till 2023-09-30 as SAP PERNR '101'.  Friedrich Felix and USA company planned to localize him in the USA ( rehire in US with end of German employment)  after his global assignment with the same user id as while he was in USA assignment SAP ID 101'. 

 

We do not want to hire Friedrich Felix  as a “new hire/new employment” in USA, rather would like to continue the global assignment user id to re-hire him. Please advise.

 

The reason for us to rehire with same user id is to have the payroll or any other 3rd party downstream system to use the same id for legal purposes.

 

Note: we are using SAP HCM to replication the USA employment and executing payroll for USA, we need to have one user so the payroll taxes and other legal payroll requirements are met.

 

Thanks

Senthil Bala

Thanks,

Roshani Nikam

entry.title: PO workflow not retriggering when there is a change in account assignment category
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Please find the below SSCUI

SSCUI-103345

 there is no way we can add few fields like Account assignment category or Payment terms.

 we want to retrigger the PO workflow when there is change in account assignment catagory or Payment terms.

Available sscui do not help to add any new fields.

Could you please let me know if you can activate any these fields through Expert configuration.

Please let me know if you need any further details.

 

Thanks & Regards,

Mohith


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

you can find the details of the BADI on this KBA

https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/3053155

KBA number 3053155

Best regards

Maria

- Screenshot, where 'Copy to New Ticket' option is missing looks to be Outbound email and so is not available.

-Whereas for other, 'Copy to New Ticket' option is showing when you click on three dots - which is an Inbound interaction.

2) I will check on you E-mail screen related query and let you know with my finding (if any) 🙂

Best Regards,

Ankush Pashine.

entry.title: Content is Key – SAP Mobile Start supports SAP Analytics Cloud KPI Tiles & Widgets
entry.content:
Accessing the right content at the right time is crucial for mobile users. We all know the situation – you are away from your desk but need to urgently look up some information, complete a business process, need to work on an urgent task or need to monitor an important KPI. With SAP Mobile Start, you can do this easily, as the app provides you with the right content like business workflows, apps and news - based on your business role/ your persona.

With the latest SAP Analytics Cloud release 2024.04, we add another important new content category: analytical KPIs. Now, You can see your SAP Analytics Cloud business KPIs in SAP Mobile Start as well.

The KPIs are shown on the respective tile or widget, and you can easily navigate to the details (analytical story) by tapping on them. Based on the configuration, analytical stories can be opened within the native SAP Analytics Cloud app or within the embedded web view of SAP Mobile Start.

SAP Mobile Start – SAP Analytics Cloud KPIs

So, how does this work? It is quite straight forward: Each KPI in SAP Analytics Cloud can be retrieved with its ID via an URL, each analytical story can be opened via an URL. Those two URLs can be used to create the needed tile in SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition, which then can be made available within SAP Mobile Start. To show KPI information like color coding or trend indicators, we do leverage the well know concept of the advanced monitoring tiles.

In the following example, we do the configuration to open the SAP Analytics Cloud story within the SAP Mobile Start embedded web view.

For the following steps, you need to have admin or report designer rights for SAP Analytics Cloud and admin rights for SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition. Please also check the SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition SAP Help documentation.

Step 1
Get the analytical story URL from SAP Analytics Cloud via the story sharing feature. In your SAP Analytics Cloud story, go to the File Menu and select the share button. Then copy the default link, the URL that points to the SAP Analytics Cloud story. 

SAP Analytics Cloud - Share story pop-up

Step 2
In the SAP Build Work Zone, standard Edition site manager, create a new app with the following parameters:

  • Open app: In new tab
  • System: No system
  • App UI technology: URL
  • URL: Add the URL to the SAP Analytics Cloud story (step 1)

Certainly, you should also assign a good name and icon to the tile.

As always, you do need to assign navigation parameters on the navigation tab. You can use:

  • Semantic Object: App
  • Action: Launch

 

SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition – Content Manager 

Step 3
In SAP Analytics Cloud, get the KPI ID by clicking on the respective context menu and select “More Options” and then just “Copy Widget ID”.
Remark: The context menu option in edit mode needs to be enabled. Please also have a look at the respective SAP Analytics Cloud SAP Help documentation and the SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition SAP Help documentation.

SAP Analytics Cloud – Retrieving KPI widget ID 

Step 4
Finally, go to the Visualisation Tab in the site manager and add the KPI ID at the end of the respective service URL in your site manager app.

 Maintain the following information:

  • Visualisation Type: Select "Dynamic App Launcher"
  • Title: auto filled
  • Subtitle: Generally, the subtitle will be fetched from SAC.  
  • Supported Devices: Check "Tablet" & "Mobile" – certainly, you can also show the tile on the desktop.
  • System: Select the SAP Analytics Cloud system.
  • Service URL: The relative API URL which returns the data structure needed for the advanced monitoring tiles. The service URL looks like below:  "/dynamic_dest/SAC/widgetquery/getWidgetData?storyId=4E182586C29ECA5EA35767AA45F13BC4&widgetId=Chart_1&type=kpiTile"

    This consists of the System (red), Story ID (blue) and WidgetID (green) which need to be configured by you.

    • The system is the same as selected above. 

    • The Story ID can be fetched from the corresponding SAC tenant URL where you see the story board. For more information check the additional information section above.

    • The Widget ID (called ID in SAC) can be fetched when editing the KPI in the SAC tenant. For more information check the additional information section above

Once all data is maintained as shown, press Save to create the app. 

SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition – Content Manager

After assigning the app to the respective role and group/ section, users should get the tile, with the updated KPI. By tapping on the tile, the SAP Analytics Cloud story opens.

I hope you like our new analytical KPI content type within SAP Mobile Start, we will certainly continue to add more attractive content types.   

For further information on the new topics, please check our SAP Mobile Start documentation.

SAP Mobile Experience offers intelligent native mobile solutions that help businesses build more efficient, resilient and sustainable end-to-end processes, improving people’s work life wherever they are.

Visit SAP Mobile Experience Community Page and click “follow” to get the latest development and innovation of our solutions. We look forward hearing about your experience with setting up the solution in your landscape; please do share your thoughts and comments below. Enter here for additional questions regarding SAP Mobile Experience Applications.

Want to be notified? Check your profile settings to ensure you have your settings activated.

entry.title: Re: Creating a custom form entry page with Flexible Programming Model

entry.title: Timesheet Price for Contractors is not Calculated
entry.content:
Hi all,

When Contractors do their timesheets every week, their price is not calculated in CATS_DA report although their activity type price for the cost centre is maintained by finance.

Could you please help me in this issue.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Is it safe to use ENQUEUE_ESINDX in S/4HANA?
entry.content:
Look at the description of the package of this lock object ESINDX...

  • S_VER_TYPES 'INTERNAL: Test types used once upon a time in shipped code'

Do you get same error with lock object EINDX (FM ENQUEUE_EINDX)

entry.title: Create a duplicate job specific competency sections on performance form
entry.content:
Hello

Is is possible to have a duplication job specific competency section on a performance form. For example have the S1 Role Specific and S2 Role Specific section where on both sections they have the same job specific competency for the user?

Currently when I try to add another competency section on the section type Job Specific is greyed out. I thought about using the custom section type but to my knowledge it only works for competencies which we hard code on the form.

If anyone might know of a possible solution it would highly be appreciated.

Many Thanks
Tumi Mumba

entry.title: A/R Credit Note uses incorrect price to affect Last Purchase Price and Moving Average
entry.content:
Hi,

Currently in our system, when posting an A/R Credit Note, item stock is returned with a value according to the sales price instead of according to the cost price at the moment of sales.

Example:

ItemPurchase PricePurchase QuantityTotalMoving Average
Doohickey1.001001001.00
Doohickey1.501001501.25
Doohickey2.001002001.50

Last Purchase Price 2.00, total stock value 450

When I sell 100 Doohickeys, I know it costs me 1.50/pcs. I put 100% margin on it, and sell it for 3.00/pcs. My total margin is 150 and the value of my left over stock is 300.

When my customer returns the 100 Doohickeys, I pay back 150, and my stock value increases by 150

ItemCN priceReturned QuantityTotalMoving Average
Doohickey  previous1.50
Doohickey3.001003002.00

Now Last Purchase Price is 3.00 and total stock value is 600.

For all intents and purposes both the Last Purchase Price and Moving Average are incorrect.

My question is, is my reasoning flawed or is this system behavior wrong or is this a matter of a setting somewhere?

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: Re: Enable "convert to new ticket" for e-mails initiated...
entry.content: Hello Ankush, both screenshot from ticket interaction facet are outbound emails. Only difference is that one is recognized as "initiiated by employee" (email sender is an email adress, which is maintained in an employee master data). The other screenshot is an outbound email from a customer email sender address

entry.title: Re: Deployed Business Process Automation not showing in M...
entry.content: Received the answer from Jerome Grondin.  I don't have a process, only an Automation so that's why it's not going to show in there.  🙂
